rows.label: tev065501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Gi Nogan about the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Gi Nogan about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Gi Nogan about enemies in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Gi Nogan if he's heard any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Gi Nogan about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Gi Nogan about the Larsians.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask Gi Nogan about the Larsians.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG0001
rows.name:
You expect me to parley with one
who could be either friend or foe?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG0002
rows.name:
Save your questions.
Now is not the time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG0007
rows.name:
I have seen nothing suspicious
of late, save perhaps for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG0008
rows.name:
If you attempt any nonsense inside,
prepare to be cut down as the dog
you are. You have been warned.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG0013
rows.name:
The electromagnetic storms that
frequent these lands wreak havoc
on the Growth's sensors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG0014
rows.name:
As it was explained to me, the
mechanical soldiers lose their
ability to track enemies as a result.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG0015
rows.name:
When I had to fight alongside them,
the machines' unreliability was a
constant thorn in my side.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG0016
rows.name:
But now that I stand against the Growth,
this weakness has become a great boon that
I can exploit during covert operations.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG0021
rows.name:
It has fallen on me of late to explore
the northwest portions of White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG0022
rows.name:
I had hoped to ask a good friend
for help, but he was busy making
preparations to face an old foe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG0023
rows.name:
This friend, Da Naguth, eldest brother of the
Three Talons, has always been like family to
me. I have cared for him since he was little.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG0024
rows.name:
And now the time has come for him to
battle his foe... I pray we are both
spared death and can return home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG1001
rows.name:
That schematic you helped me seize
earned me praise from Prince Jiarg.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG1002
rows.name:
Zo Zinath is deciphering it.
If you are curious, you should
have a word with him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG1003
rows.name:
Shamefully, I have never had a gift
for engineering or machinery.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG1004
rows.name:
Zo Zinath scolds me and says I must train the
muscles in my brain, not just the rest of them.
As if it comes that easily to everyone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG1005
rows.name:
Still, considering the technology
our enemy possesses, he is
right. I must do better.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG1006
rows.name: I must ask Zo Zinath to instruct me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG1011
rows.name:
I have a friend, Da Naguth, who is the
eldest brother of the Three Talons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG1012
rows.name:
And now he has finally struck down
his enemy of many long years![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG1013
rows.name:
As he has always been like a younger
brother to me, I take some pride in the
fact—but I must not trumpet it too loudly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG1014
rows.name:
The victory is his—and as equals,
we must better each other and bring
a glorious future to Lars.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG1019
rows.name:
I had a friend, Da Naguth, who was the
eldest brother of the Three Talons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG1020
rows.name:
He went to strike down a rival of many
long years, but died in the attempt.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG1021
rows.name:
We were not of the same blood, but
I cared for him like a younger
brother. The loss is devastating.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065501_MSG1022
rows.name:
At least he met his end in a way
his brothers can be proud of—with
Larsian strength and valor![ST:wait ]
